name: RDF Graph
description: Structure documentation for an RDF graph in the RDF/JSON serialization. An RDF graph is a set of triples organized as a map of subjects to predicate-object arrays.
patternKey: Subject IRI or blank node identifier

patternValue.description: A map from predicate IRIs to arrays of object values for this subject.

fields.name: type
fields.description: The RDF term type: uri for IRI references, literal for typed/language values, bnode for blank nodes.

fields.name: value
fields.description: The value: an IRI string, lexical literal form, or blank node identifier.

fields.name: lang
fields.description: BCP47 language tag, present only for language-tagged literals.

fields.name: datatype
fields.description: Datatype IRI for typed literals. Defaults to xsd:string.
